crime.quote: JENNIE LEARNS ABOUT THE DIAMONDS OF THE PRINCESS

victim.quote: JENNIE LEARNS ABOUT THE DIAMONDS OF THE PRINCESS

closed_world.value: European diplomatic circles and Vienna Court society
closed_world.quote: There is internal trouble of some kind at the Court of Vienna

resolution.value: Jennie solves the diamond mystery through journalistic investigation

investigator.value: Jennie Baxter, journalist acting as amateur detective
investigator.quote: Miss Jennie Baxter, with several final and dainty touches

red_herring.value: Rumoured dynamite explosion at Vienna palace used as misdirection from actual government conspiracy
red_herring.quote: there came a rumour from Vienna that an attempt had been made on the life of the Emperor

social_world.value: Diplomatic hierarchy with ambassadors, ministers, and aristocratic connections concealing government secrets
social_world.quote: great turn-out of ambassadors and ministers, and their presence gave colour and dignity

alibi.value: Princess and Ambassador have conflicting recollections of conversations at the Duchess's ball
alibi.quote: I was compelled to leave early. You should have come to me sooner

media_and_audience.value: Society papers and official contradictions shape public perception of diplomatic incidents
media_and_audience.quote: This was promptly contradicted, but we all know what official contradictions amount to

investigator_wound.value: Jennie's professional ambition to achieve European reputation through dangerous diplomatic exposure
investigator_wound.quote: such an article would give us a European reputation
